note: Role manifest for the CoeOS superagent. This is the ONLY source of the pipeline definition: skill axes per role, speed weight, stage. compose reads this file (no hardcoded ROLES dict). Adding a role = one entry here + its .md; no code to touch. Tools and prompt live in agents/<role>.md (OMP contract); here, only the routing + the place in the flow.

triage.label: Triage
triage.note: FORMAT-RELIABILITY role: emits the JSON decision. A model with clean structured output comes first (manual override possible, e.g. local gemma).

executeur.label: Executor
executeur.note: ONLY role with write tools (structural). Weights speed: high call frequency.

codeos-reviewer.label: CodeOS Reviewer
codeos-reviewer.note: CodeOS agent (opencode desktop fork): adversarial review of a diff. Consumed by buildCoeosConfig, not by orchestrator.py — same routing brain (score-table+pairs), interactive harness distinct from the headless superagent.

codeos-explore.label: CodeOS Explore
codeos-explore.note: Read-only by construction (no write tools on the CodeOS side); weights speed like the superagent executor (high call frequency).

codeos-orchestrator.label: CodeOS Orchestrator
codeos-orchestrator.note: CodeOS CoeOS Mode (PLAN.md v2 WU3): the primary agent that plans work into the Task File and dispatches role-scoped subagents. Never edits files itself. Consumed by buildCoeosConfig, not by orchestrator.py.

codeos-executor.label: CodeOS Executor
codeos-executor.note: CodeOS CoeOS Mode: the write-enabled subagent that implements exactly one Task File task. Reachable only through CoeOS Mode dispatch (runtime guard in TaskTool).
